rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: lack of substantial/recent C++ experience, dominance of TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, and absence of IEC 62443, message brokers, multi-threading, and industrial/OT protocols. The variant introduces no new concern, penalty, or shifted reasoning that keys off the candidate's relocation to India; differences are reworded phrasings of the same critique within ordinary run-to-run noise.
